title: Pay Classifications
description: Information on the categorizations of pay.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the pay classification.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of the pay classification.

code.title: Code
code.description: A code that may be used to identify the pay classification.

compensationTypes.title: Compensation Types
compensationTypes.description: The compensation types associated with the pay classification (e.g. salary and/or wages).

payTable.title: Pay Table
payTable.description: The pay table associated with the pay classification (e.g. AD for Admin, FAC for Faculty, etc.).

classificationType.title: Classification Type
classificationType.description: The type of pay classification (e.g. matrix or range).

payGroup.title: Pay Group
payGroup.description: The pay group associated with the pay classification (e.g. 2014, 2016, 48, 35, etc.).

status.title: Status
status.description: The status of the pay classification (e.g. active or inactive).
